title: sida meridionalis
intro: Sida meridionalis is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the southern sida. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Sida meridionalis include relieving pain, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, and it is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
